result.text: Grok has worked for conversation and navigation in our HW4 Teslas for quite awhile now. It even coached us up an icy mountain road by telling us what off-road settings to use and how to drive in the slippery areas. The one problem, is that Grok (Ara) will sometimes just join a conversation that you are having with someone else. That can be disconcerting.
